name: 偏心父母×被拋棄親女
name_en: Neglectful parents vs. abandoned biological daughter
description: 血緣關係的背叛是最具情感殺傷力的衝突。父母本應是最親的人卻成為最大的加害者，這種反差製造了極深的情感創傷和觀眾共情。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: But I'm your real daughter just because you abandoned me. I'm not your daughter just because you for 18 years never raised me. ... In this family photo, there's dad, mom, Fu Yin, and the eight of them. I'm the only one missing.
examples.context: 血緣關係的背叛是最具情感殺傷力的衝突。父母本應是最親的人卻成為最大的加害者，這種反差製造了極深的情感創傷和觀眾共情。
